name: The Third Piglet's Tower
author: Poki
description: The Third Piglet's Tower is a management game where three hardworking piglets set out to build a tower to the sky! Start from the foundation by mining stones, chopping trees, and crafting planks and bricks. Optimize and automate your workflow, sell materials on the market, and reinvest your earnings to upgrade the piglets’ working base. Can you help them reach the clouds with their mighty tower? P How to play The Third Piglet's Tower? Click or tap to make the choice. Who created The Third Piglet's Tower? The Third Piglet's Tower is created by Airapport. Play their other games on Poki: Babel Tower and Farm and Mine ! How can I play The Third Piglet's Tower for free? You can play The Third Piglet's Tower for free on Poki. Can I play The Third Piglet's Tower on mobile devices and desktop? The Third Piglet's Tower can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
